exercises.title: Kernel Generator
exercises.description: Generate the full kernel from a generator point.
exercises.task: Compute all points in the kernel <G> given generator G of order n.
exercises.solution:
def generate_kernel(G: tuple, n: int, a: int, p: int) -> list:
    kernel = [None]  # Point at infinity
    current = G
    for _ in range(n - 1):
        kernel.append(current)
        current = ec_add(current, G, a, p)
    return kernel
